perturbation.original_text: iv) e-centives will pay for these General Program Member User Data records to Excite@Home at a rate of $***** per unique User Data record. This rate will apply only to the first ***** records. e-centives will pay Excite@Home $***** in payments for these General Program Member User Data records over the Term of this Agreement, in accordance with the schedule set out in Section 7.d. In the event that more than ***** such General Program Member User Data records are supplied, payments for such additional records shall be governed by Section 7.e. v) The failure of Excite@Home to deliver at least ***** of these General Program Member User Data records shall not be deemed a breach of this Agreement. To the extent that Excite@Home fails to deliver at least ***** General Program Member User Data records, however, e-centives' total payment obligations under Section 7.a.iv shall be correspondingly reduced at the rate of $***** per record for any shortfall. In no event will any failure to deliver at least ***** General Program Member User Data records constitute cause to extend the Term of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: iv) e-centives will pay for these General Program Member User Data records to Excite@Home at a rate of $***** per unique User Data record. This rate will apply only to the first ***** records. e-centives will pay Excite@Home $***** in payments for these General Program Member User Data records over the Term of this Agreement, in accordance with the schedule set out in Section 7.d. In the event that more than ***** such General Program Member User Data records are supplied, payments for such additional records shall be at a rate of $0.01 per record governed by Section 7.e. v) The failure of Excite@Home to deliver at least ***** of these General Program Member User Data records shall not be deemed a breach of this Agreement. To the extent that Excite@Home fails to deliver at least ***** General Program Member User Data records, however, e-centives' total payment obligations under Section 7.a.iv shall be correspondingly reduced at the rate of $***** per record for any shortfall. In no event will any failure to deliver at least ***** General Program Member User Data records constitute cause to extend the Term of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by changing the payment rate for additional records to "$0.01 per record" while the original text implied that the rate would be the same but governed by Section 7.e. This directly contradicts the rate mentioned in the beginning of section 7.a.iv, causing ambiguity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: iv) e-centives will pay for these General Program Member User Data records to Excite@Home at a rate of $***** per unique User Data record. This rate will apply only to the first ***** records. e-centives will pay Excite@Home $***** in payments for these General Program Member User Data records over the Term of this Agreement, in accordance with the schedule set out in Section 7.d. In the event that more than ***** such General Program Member User Data records are supplied, payments for such additional records shall be at a rate of $0.01 per record governed by Section 7.e.
perturbation.justification: The changed text creates a direct contradiction. The original text implies the payment rate would remain consistent for additional records, merely governed by a different section (7.e). The change explicitly states a new rate of $0.01 for additional records, conflicting with the rate initially defined in the contradicted text 'e-centives will pay for these General Program Member User Data records to Excite@Home at a rate of $***** per unique User Data record.' This inconsistency regarding the payment rate constitutes a strong in-text contradiction.
